name: Kulebra and the Souls of Limbo
short_description: Help the cursed souls of Limbo escape their endless time loop in the afterlife. As Kulebra, a newly-deceased snake, witness their grief and guide them toward closure through point-and-click puzzles, light stealth, and empathy-driven boss encounters.
detailed_description:
A soulful mystery awaits in Kulebra and the Souls of Limbo, the enchanting and heart-warming adventure where death is just the beginning of the journey. 

From the colors and the characters, to the puzzles and exploration, Kulebra and the Souls of Limbo is a warm and wonderful trip through a vibrant Latin American-flavored world known as Limbo, interwoven with humor, heart and just a little bit of darkness.


As Kulebra - a snake who awakens in the afterlife with no memory of their past - you are tasked with unravelling the mystery of Limbo, a strange phenomenon that keeps the residents who dwell there repeating the same day on end, all whilst piecing together your own mysterious past.

Limbo’s citizens are trapped in a moment of their lives. The sun rises and sets as they go through the same motions every day, never really understanding the monotonous cycle that they are experiencing. But Kulebra is different. They remember everything, and have the ability to advance time at will. These very special skills will be indispensable in helping Kulebra unfurl the mystery of why these souls are trapped, and how they can be freed.

A host of unforgettable spirits, entities, and characters inhabit Limbo. There are brilliant allies to aid and guide you, citizens to engage you in spirited conversations, native entities with their own feelings about the dead, and those who have deeper and darker motivations. It’s up to you to find out which is which and who is who.

Kulebra is a unique type of entity in this world, a Bright Soul. While you are counted among the dead, you are one of the few who have the unique ability to change the cycles many of the dead find themselves in. Through conversation, discovery, empathy, and some snooping around, you can mark the souls of the dead, helping them overcome what keeps them trapped, and eventually move on. You can help the Souls of Limbo create actual and lasting change.

ABOUT THE DEVELOPER

Galla was founded by two Dominican brothers in Illinois, USA, in 2015, although we started long before moving to the USA. We decided to form this studio because we want to bring adventures and stories that spark enjoyment and leave a big impact on those who experience it, the same way past games shaped us.

Our first project was a mobile endless runner with story elements. This game helped us gain a lot of development insight and confidence as developers. We didn’t want to give up on the studio and our game, so we decided to give the characters and setting of that game a second life to transform them into something a lot closer to games we’ve loved, leading to the creation of Kulebra and the Souls of Limbo.
